title: Pachamala Poovu Lyrics Kizhakku Vasal
stanzas:
<div>
Pachamala Poovu Song Lyrics Kizhakku Vasal

pachamala poovu
nee uchchi mala thaenu
kutham kurai yedhu
nee nandhavana thaeru(2)

azhage ponnumani
sirichaa velli mani
kiliye kannurangau
thoori thoori hoi

pachamala poovu
nee uchchi mala thaenu
kutham kurai yedhu
nee nandhavana thaeru

kaathodu malar aada
kaar kuzhal aada
kaathoram lolaakku
sangathi paada (2)

manjalo dhegam
konja varum megam
anjugam thoonga
kondu varum raagam

nilava vaan nilava
naan pudichu vaaren
kuliye poonguyile
paatteduthu thaaren hoi

pachama poovu
nee uchchi mala thaenu
kutham kurai yedhu
nee nandhavana thaeru

azhage ponnumani
sirichaa velli mani
kiliye kannurangau
thoori thoori hoi

pachama poovu
nee uchchi mala thaenu
kutham kurai yedhu
nee nandhavana thaeru

poonaathu mugam paathu
vennilaa naana.
thaazhaamal thadam paarthu
vandha vazhi poga.

siththirathu sola
muththumani maala
moththathula thaaren
thukkam enna maane

vannamaa vaanavillil
nooledthu vaaren
vinnula meen pudichu
sela thaichi thaaren hoi

pachama poovu
nee uchchi mala thaenu
kutham kurai yedhu
nee nandhavana thaeru

azhage ponnumani
sirichaa velli mani
kiliye kannurangau
thoori thoori hoi

pachama poovu
nee uchchi mala thaenu
kutham kurai yedhu
nee nandhavana thaeru

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pachamala Poovu?

The song conveys themes of love and beauty, using nature as a metaphor for romantic feelings.

What is the plot context of the movie Kizhakku Vaasal?

The movie revolves around love and relationships, showcasing the emotional journey of its characters.

Who is the singer of Pachamala Poovu?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

Who composed the music for Pachamala Poovu?

The music was composed by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja.

When was Pachamala Poovu released?

The song was released on July 12, 1990.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pachamala Poovu, the lyrics beautifully express the feelings of love and longing, set against the backdrop of nature's splendor. The song evokes a sense of nostalgia, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. With its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, it resonates deeply with listeners. This classic piece remains a cherished favorite, capturing the essence of timeless romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pachamala Poovu from the Kizhakku Vaasal is a timeless melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song transports listeners to a world of beauty and emotion. Experience the magic of this classic that continues to resonate with hearts across generations.
stanzaMeanings: You are the green flower, the sweet honey of the high mountain, what is lacking in you, you are the boat of the garden.
Oh beautiful one, does the golden girl smile? The silver bell bird sings, spreading joy everywhere.
You are the green flower, the sweet honey of the high mountain, what is lacking in you, you are the boat of the garden.
With the breeze, the flowers dance, the curls sway, the wind sings a song.
In the mind, the body will come like a cloud, bringing a melody that makes you sleep.
The moon in the sky, I will come to you, I will sing in the blooming flower.
You are the green flower, the sweet honey of the high mountain, what is lacking in you, you are the boat of the garden.
Oh beautiful one, does the golden girl smile? The silver bell bird sings, spreading joy everywhere.
You are the green flower, the sweet honey of the high mountain, what is lacking in you, you are the boat of the garden.
Looking at the face of the girl from the past, I am the moon. Without falling, I will go the way I came.
The beautiful words are like a pearl necklace, in the end, what is the comfort for me?
I will come to the sky, catching the fish in the sky, I will bring joy to you.
You are the green flower, the sweet honey of the high mountain, what is lacking in you, you are the boat of the garden.
Oh beautiful one, does the golden girl smile? The silver bell bird sings, spreading joy everywhere.
You are the green flower, the sweet honey of the high mountain, what is lacking in you, you are the boat of the garden.
